question: How do I create an account to save my trips?
answer: Click the Login link in the top right of the navigation bar and enter a username and password. If your account does not exist yet, click Create Account. After registering, you will automatically be logged in and redirected to the My Trips page.

question: Do I need to log in before adding trails, climbs, or camping spots to a trip?
answer: Yes. You must be logged in so the system knows which account your trips belong to.

question: How do I add a trail, climbing route, or camping spot to one of my trips?
answer: Each activity card includes a + button. Click it and select which trip you want to add the activity to.

question: Can I edit or rename a trip after I create it?
answer: Yes. Go to the My Trips page and click on the desired trip card. A popup editor will appear where you can change details.

question: How do I remove an activity from a trip?
answer: Open the trip editor and use the minus button next to the item inside the Trails, Climbing, or Camping section.

question: How does the search and filtering system work?
answer: You can search by location or filter by difficulty and activity type. The search and filters can be used together to narrow down results.

question: Can I have multiple trips saved at the same time?
answer: Yes. You can create multiple trips and organize different activities in each one.

question: Who created the Outdoor Adventure Planner and what was the goal of the project?
answer: This application was created by Peter Yehl as a course project to help users organize multiple outdoor adventures in one place.
